## Summary

- What did you add, remove, or change?

## Project Link

- Repository or resource URL:

## Section

- Which README section did you update?

## Relevance

- How does this project clearly use LangChain or LangGraph?

## Maturity Signal

- GitHub stars:
- Last meaningful update:
- Exception reason, if under 10 stars:

## Checklist

- [ ] I placed the entry in the most appropriate category
- [ ] I verified the project or resource link works
- [ ] If this is a GitHub repository, it is not archived
- [ ] If this is a Community Project, it has recent activity and is not stale
- [ ] If this is a Community Project, it has at least 10 GitHub stars, or I explained the exception
- [ ] I followed the formatting style used in the README
- [ ] I used a factual description, not marketing copy
- [ ] I linked the correct project root, or the linked subdirectory is clearly documented in the root repository
- [ ] This pull request adds only one project or one focused change
- [ ] I updated related badges, descriptions, or section placement if needed

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should know?
